channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: We Asked the ‘Future of Truth’ Author to Explain How He Used AI. It Didn’t Go Well
item.description: A book about how AI shapes perceptions of reality came under fire for using AI-generated quotes. Its problems go beyond that.

item.title: CD Projekt Red CEO says the studio's 'ambitious' plans for a new Witcher trilogy could mean no expansions for The Witcher 4 — 'It would be difficult, to be very honest'
item.description: CD Projekt Red has suggested that the next Witcher trilogy, which starts with The Witcher 4, may not get any expansions.

item.title: Pinterest cut AI costs 90% by gutting a frontier model's vision layer
item.description: At 620 million monthly users, calling a frontier model for every image recommendation isn't a strategy — it's a bill. Pinterest CTO Matt Madrigal solved it by gutting Qwen3-VL's vision layer and rebuilding it with proprietary embeddings, cutting costs 90% and boosting accuracy 30%.Madrigal’s team has been heavily investing in customizing open-source models “foundationally in-house.” “If you've got really unique data that you can then fine-tune an open source model with, data quality will, frankly, outweigh or overcome model size,” Madrigal explained in a recent VB Beyond the Pilot podcast. How...

item.title: Microsoft teases new Surface hardware and ‘a new era of PC’
item.description: I pondered the other day what's next for Microsoft's Surface PC lineup, and it looks like we're about to find out. Windows and Surface chief Pavan Davuluri has just teased "something new is coming for developers," complete with a mysterious image of what looks like a curved display edge. Davuluri notes that whatever is coming […]

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

item.title: Le chargeur ultime pour vos voyages ? Ce modèle Anker 65W multi-ports est à prix cassé
item.description: Avec ses trois ports de charge et son format compact, ce chargeur Anker de 65 W met fin à tous vos problèmes de batterie et, chez Amazon, il est disponible à prix cassé.

item.title: Nintendo quietly launched a new game that's just like WarioWare, and you can try it for free
item.description: Nintendo has launched Pictonico!, a new mobile game that uses your photos.

item.title: CISA warns that Nx Console and GitHub repositories abused in multiple supply chain compromises – tools across enterprise, cloud, and DevOps environments exploited
item.description: The agency is giving practical advice on how to remain secure in an increasingly unsecure environment.

item.title: Paramount+ used AI to make the ugliest Star Trek thumbnail ever
item.description: We've never seen Captain Kirk wearing an outfit quite like this one.

item.title: Vous cherchez un smartphone pas cher pour l’été ? Voici notre sélection à moins de 200 €
item.description: Si vous cherchez un bon smartphone à moins de 200 euros, notre dernière vidéo vous présente justement les meilleurs du moment.

item.title: I made an AI clone of myself based on my Google and Reddit history — and it understood me better than I expected
item.description: I used years of Reddit comments and Google history to create an AI version of myself in ChatGPT

item.title: On a testé la MG4 Urban : à 20 000 €, c’est peut-être la voiture électrique la plus intéressante du moment
item.description: C'est peut-être le casse de l'année. Ne vous fiez pas à son patronyme, mais la MG4 Urban n’a de citadine que le prix. En étirant sa silhouette, son équipement de série, et en faisant chuter son prix, la marque sino-britannique braque littéralement le segment des voitures électriques compactes. Les Renault Mégane E-Tech et Volkswagen ID.3 n'ont qu'à bien se tenir. Mais au point de faire quelles concessions sur la route ? Voici notre essai. ...

item.title: Samsung Movingstyle Essential Review: A Screen on Wheels
item.description: Made for those who hate having a TV in the home, Samsung’s Movingstyle monitor-on-wheels brings the entertainment when you need it and hides away in a closet when you don’t.

item.title: Amazon has a bunch of multi-port Anker fast chargers on sale — get up to $30 off this weekend
item.description: Shop the best deals on Anker fast chargers at Amazon. Save on the Nano, a three-port wall block, and a 112W desktop charger.

item.title: Casetify has released an actual Tamagotchi device, and it is peak millennial nostalgia
item.description: Casetify is releasing a custom-branded Tamagotchi device alongside a nostalgia-packed collection of tech accessories starting at $36.

item.title: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI to become worlds most valuable AI company
item.description: With a new valuation of nearly one trillion dollars, Anthropic is now more valuable than OpenAI.

item.title: Agon Pro 27 : AOC lance à son tour un écran gamer Full HD à 1000 Hz
item.description: AOC dévoile un nouvel écran en 1080p capable de supporter une fréquence de rafraîchissement de 1000 Hz. Pour des jeux d'une fluidité extrême.

item.title: Un nouvel échec : la fusée Blue Origin explose de façon spectaculaire avant son décollage à Cap Canaveral
item.description: Sept jours après avoir reçu le feu vert de la FAA pour reprendre ses vols, Blue Origin a perdu sa fusée New Glenn dans une explosion sur son pas de tir de Cap Canaveral. Un accident qui tombe au plus mauvais moment pour la société de Jeff Bezos, engagée dans des contrats commerciaux majeurs et...

item.title: Palantir's 'unlimited access' to patient data — we examine the US tech giant's controversial £330 million contract with the NHS
item.description: While the NHS has just granted Palantir "unlimited access" to patient data, the relationship between the UK public health sector and the controversial American firm dates back to 2020. Here's how we get here, and what's at stake.

item.title: Fitbit Air reviews: Is it time for a fitness tracker upgrade?
item.description: Fitbit has a new screenless health tracker, but does it measure up to the competition?

item.title: Backrooms review: Does the online creepypasta make a good full-length movie?
item.description: Mashable's review of "Backrooms", Kane Parsons' A24 horror about a store owner discovering the doorway to another world in his basement.

item.title: OpenAI just quietly retired the last of the GPT-4 models — and it feels like the end of an AI era
item.description: OpenAI has confirmed that GPT-4.5 will be removed from ChatGPT next month, marking the end of the GPT-4 era.

item.title: The Eufy E15 robot lawn mower is down to its best-ever price — nearly half off at Amazon
item.description: The Eufy E15 robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for just $949.99. That's $850 or nearly 50% in savings and its best price ever.

item.title: A new Fire TV pop-up takes over your entire screen at startup, and it could be the beginning of the end — here’s why users think Amazon could open it up to third-party advertisers
item.description: A new pop-up has appeared on Fire TV devices, and users are worried that more third-party advertisers are about to block your view.

item.title: Compatible Dolby Atmos, cette barre de son Yamaha 2.1.2 à -50 % mise tout sur l’immersion
item.description: Si vous cherchez à mettre la main sur une barre de son offrant une belle immersion, mais que votre budget n'est pas extensible, alors la Yamaha SR-X40A pourrait bien vous convenir. Ce modèle 2.1.2 canaux est proposé à 299 euros au lieu de 599 euros par Boulanger.

item.title: 'The situation isn’t looking good' — Russia halts VPN fees, but the Kremlin's war against censorship circumvention tools doubles down
item.description: A new major wave of VPN blocks has left residents with very few means of going back online. Here's all we know.

item.title: The best TV deals to shop this weekend: Save on Sony, Toshiba, and Hisense
item.description: Missed the Memorial Day sales? You can still save up to 46% on a new TV from Hisense, Toshiba, or Sony.

item.title: Best power station deals to shop this weekend: Save up to $750 on Bluetti, Anker, and Jackery
item.description: Save up to $750 on the best power station deals from Jackery, Bluetti, and Anker Solix at Amazon this weekend.

item.title: This compact antivirus protection package is now less than £25 — Norton 360 has everything you need to secure your devices against malware, ransomware, and hacking
item.description: Secure your online life for less than £25 — Norton 360 Standard is 64% off right now

item.title: AI agents are entering their rebuild era as enterprises confront the reliability problem
item.description: As enterprise AI agents move into production, organizations are confronting a growing reliability problem. Many teams are discovering that LLM performance alone does not determine whether agents succeed in production. Long-running AI workflows must survive crashes, preserve state, recover from failures, manage inference costs, and coordinate across APIs, tools, and enterprise systems.After a first wave focused on rapid deployment, organizations now need to revisit those first-generation implementations, and redesign early agent architectures around workflow orchestration, observability, govern...

item.title: The Vatican’s Man Inside Anthropic
item.description: Pope Leo XIV may not be able to disarm AI, but he’s got the attention of the industry.

item.title: Trump’s mass deportations are only possible with racial profiling
item.description: Border security czar Tom Homan keeps threatening to "flood" New York City with ICE agents. But a new investigation shows that ICE has been quietly ramping up arrests in the New York area already - and disproportionately targeting Latino neighborhoods. The City, a local nonprofit news organization, found 430 street arrests in the metropolitan area […]...

item.title: At $549, Lenovo’s Legion Go S gaming handheld is suddenly a good deal
item.description: This week, the Steam Deck OLED with 512GB of storage went from $549 to $789, putting it even further out of reach for those who were considering getting one as they came back in stock after months of unavailability. I consider it a tiny consolation that there’s a decent PC gaming handheld that is currently […]

item.title: 007 First Light is the stealthy James Bond game I've dreamed of
item.description: Of course the Hitman devs made a great James Bond game.

item.title: Climatiseur connecté Xiaomi : pourquoi la France n’y a pas droit ?
item.description: Xiaomi lance un climatiseur en Europe, mais pas en France. On vous explique pourquoi.

item.title: You can buy two of Anker’s Qi2 wireless chargers for under $25
item.description: If you’re looking for a fast iPhone or AirPods charger that’s easy to toss into your purse, backpack, or carry-on, Anker’s Zolo Magnetic Wireless Charger is a smart pick. It’s tiny and comes with a built-in USB-C cable, and you currently can buy two for $23.99 ($16 off) at Amazon and Anker (with code WS7DV2PK68EW), […]

item.title: How this vegetable became the latest symbol of America’s affordability squeeze
item.description: According to the most recent Consumer Price Index, tomato prices have skyrocketed nearly 40%. Tomatoes, ubiquitous in everything from fast-food burgers to haute cuisine, are taking on a new role beyond the plate: A nagging reminder of rising costs.Prices for those red orbs have soared more than any other food product over the past year to cement a spot as one of the consumer headaches du jour.“The tomato has become a symbol of something much deeper,” says Isaac Bernal Carbajo, a New York City chef who lamented life’s “simplest pleasures” falling victim to price increases. “Something as basic a...
